StrandedShipParts.title: Ship Structure Stranded
StrandedShipParts.description:
Part of your ship has been disconnected from the parent ship!

Any [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color] or other [color=KHAKI]Buildings[/color] NOT connected to any part of the parent ship, will be considered as disconnected and will be left behind when entering [color=KHAKI]high burn[/color].

PlaceFloorLesson.title: Deck Plating
PlaceFloorLesson.description: [color=KHAKI]Deck Plating[/color] can only be placed on top of [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color]. Ensure you have placed enough [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color] to cover the area you wish to place [color=KHAKI]Deck Plating[/color].

PlaceHullMountedBuilding.title: Hull-Mounted Buildings
PlaceHullMountedBuilding.description: [color=KHAKI]Hull-Mounted Buildings[/color] must be placed on top of [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color] or [color=KHAKI]Hull Armour[/color]. Ensure you have placed enough [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color] or [color=KHAKI]Hull Armour[/color] to cover the area you wish to place [color=KHAKI]Hull-Mounted Buildings[/color].

PlaceInternalDoor.title: Internal Doors
PlaceInternalDoor.description: Any internal door will slowly leak atmosphere when placed on an external (next to space) [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color]. Use an [color=KHAKI]Airlock Door[/color] instead unless you plan to enclose the internal door inside a room.

EnteredHighBurn.title: High Burn
EnteredHighBurn.description:
Finally, you've managed to enter [color=KHAKI]high burn[/color]!

Explorers sent from Mother Earth would report how treacherous and deadly their expeditions were while travelling and living in space. This era would come to be known as the [i]SpaceSlog[/i].

Now it's your turn to follow in their footsteps, exploring and documenting the great unknown: the unforgiving, cold, dark void... the [i]Slog[/i].

Exploration.title: High Burn
Exploration.description:
You should be aware that your crew cannot exit the ship due to extremely high pressures. Any external repairs or personal crew explorations must take place when not in [color=KHAKI]high burn[/color].

You will receive notifications when you pass something of interest, or you may spot something yourself. These are good opportunities to drop from [color=KHAKI]high burn[/color] and explore.

Remember, dropping out of [color=KHAKI]high burn[/color] leaves you vulnerable while waiting for your burn meter to refill again.

HarshSpace.title: High Burn
HarshSpace.description:
Space is harsh and unforgiving, so be prepared to lose many crew members, or even your ship entirely.

The further you travel and explore, the more of the unknown you will uncover.

Good luck!

Breach.title: Breaches
Breach.description:
Your ship has been breached! Any breached tiles will cause atmosphere to leak from any adjoining rooms.

You will need to quickly patch the area by constructing additional [color=KHAKI]Ship Structure[/color] over the breach.

Note that if you have [color=PURPLE]Black Alert[/color] activated, your crew will not be able to interact with the breached tiles.
